---
title: "Complete attestation questionnaires"
date: last-modified
---

Complete the attestation questionnaire to verify and certify model attributes at a specific point in time. This process creates an audit trail of model information and ensures accountability.

::: {.attn}

## Prerequisites

- [x] {{< var link.login >}}
- [x] The model is already registered in the model inventory.[^1]
- [x] Model validation findings have been documented.
- [x] You are a [{{< fa circle-check >}} model owner]{.bubble} or assigned another role with sufficient permissions to complete attestations.[^3]

:::

## Steps

When prompted on your dashboard:

1. Click **Open Attestations {{< fa arrow-right >}}**

   Alternatively, you can access attestations for models that you are the owner of by clicking **{{< fa clipboard >}} Attestations** in one of these pages:

   - Inventory
   - Findings

2. In the **Attestations** sidebar on the right, click one of the active attestation requests to start the process.

   The view that opens shows you a model snapshot at the point in time when the attestation was created.

3. Click **Start Attestation**.

4. Document the status change to [**{{< fa clipboard >}} In Progress**]{.bubble} in the [notes]{.smallcaps .b} field and click **Confirm**.

   After you confirm the status change to [**{{< fa clipboard >}} In Progress**]{.bubble}, the attestation questionnaire is ready to be completed.

5. In the right sidebar, complete the attestation questionnaire, including:

5. In the right sidebar, complete the attestation questionnaire:
   - Review the model snapshot and findings
   - Check applicable boxes
   - Add relevant comments where needed

6. Click **Submit for Review**.

7. Document the status change in the [notes]{.smallcaps .b} field for your reviewer and click **Confirm**.

After you confirm the status change, the attestation questionnaire is sent to your reviewer to be completed, typically the validator associated with the model at the time the snapshot for the attestation process was taken.

::: {.callout}
The attestation sidebar remains visible as you navigate through different views of the model, allowing you to reference the questionnaire while reviewing model details.
:::

## What's next

- [Review and approve attestations](/guide/attestation/reviewing-attestation-questionnaires.qmd)
- [Export attestations](/guide/attestation/export-attestations.qmd)

<!-- FOOTNOTES -->

[^1]: [Register models in the inventory](/guide/model-inventory/register-models-in-inventory.qmd)

[^3]: [Manage permissions](/guide/configuration/manage-permissions.qmd)
